attempts.test_code:
from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_includes_all_items_and_doubles_correctly():
    items = list(range(10))  # 10 items
    result = process_batch(items)
    assert len(result) == len(items), f"Expected {len(items)} results, got {len(result)}"
    expected = [x * 2 for x in items]
    assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected}, got {result}"}

attempts.test_code:
import pytest
from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_includes_all_items():
    items = [1, 2, 3]
    expected = [x * 2 for x in items]
    result = process_batch(items)
    assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected}, got {result}"
